query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_pagos,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN amount > 0 THEN 1 END) as pagos_con_monto,
  SUM(amount) as monto_total
FROM payments;

SELECT 
  id,
  projectId,
  amount,
  type,
  receivedAt,
  method
FROM payments
ORDER BY receivedAt DESC
LIMIT 20;
